ReentrancyError
ReentrancyLock
non_reentrantc
__name__
__module__
__qualname__
>/usr/lib64/python3.9/site-packages/scipy/_lib/_threadsafety.pyr
    Threading lock that raises an exception for reentrant calls.
    Calls from different threads are serialized, and nested calls from the
    same thread result to an error.
    The object can be used as a context manager or to decorate functions
    via the decorate() method.
    c
	threading
RLock
_rlock
_entered
_err_msg)
self
err_msgr

ReentrancyLock.__init__c
acquirer
releaser
	__enter__
ReentrancyLock.__enter__c
type
value
	tracebackr
__exit__%
ReentrancyLock.__exit__c
func
caller*
z'ReentrancyLock.decorate.<locals>.caller)
scipyZ
_lib
	decorator
decorate)
ReentrancyLock.decorateN)
__doc__r
    Decorate a function with a threading lock and prevent reentrant calls.
    c
%s is not re-entrant)
lock
z non_reentrant.<locals>.decoratorr
N)	r
scipy._lib.decoratorr
__all__
